# Hardline Theme

`hardline()` is a backward-compatible alias of the **[Concrete theme](/docs/themes/concrete)**.

Use `concrete()` for new projects, or keep `hardline()` if you already have it in an existing codebase.

## Usage

```tsx title="docs.config.ts"
import { defineDocs } from "@farming-labs/docs";
import { hardline } from "@farming-labs/theme/hardline";

export default defineDocs({
  entry: "docs",
  theme: hardline(),
});
```

```css title="app/global.css"
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@farming-labs/theme/hardline/css";
```
